category_sources: Official GitHub README says enpass-cli is a command-line utility for the Enpass password manager: https://github.com/hazcod/enpass-cli
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README heading use enpass-cli: https://github.com/hazcod/enpass-cli

Official README links to pkg.go.dev for library documentation.
